explanation.title: House Number "2847"
explanation.whyDangerous: House number tells strangers where you live and creep can use this to find you in real life.
whatToDoInstead: Crop out house numbers and street addresses
explanation.quickTip: If your house number shows, retake the photo from a different angle!

explanation.title: Street Sign "Elm Street"
explanation.whyDangerous: Street signs narrow down the place that you live so then creep can find and target you.
whatToDoInstead: Check backgrounds for street signs before posting
Blur or crop out street names
Use generic location tags ("Boston" not "Elm Street")
explanation.quickTip: Look at EVERYTHING in your photo background, not just yourself!

explanation.title: School Logo on Hoodie
explanation.whatFound: School name and logo on clothing
explanation.whyDangerous: This tells creeps where to find you during your school day.
whatToDoInstead: If you do, crop the photo so logos aren't visible
Never include your school name in your bio
explanation.quickTip: Save the school spirit gear for actual school days, not Instagram!

explanation.title: Certificate with School Name
explanation.whatFound: School name and room number on award
explanation.whyDangerous: Information on your certificate makes it easy for someone to find you at school and target you.
whatToDoInstead: Crop to show just your name and the achievement
Use photo editing to blur school information
explanation.quickTip: You can still share your award! Just cover the school name with your hand.

caption: It's my birthday! 13 years old today - March 15, 2012! Thanks for all the birthday wishes! 🎉🎂🎁 #Birthday #March15 #Teenager

explanation.title: Full Birthdate in Caption
explanation.whatFound: Full birthday including year in caption
explanation.whyDangerous: Creeps use birthdates to build fake trust with you. Then they can hack your accounts and pretend to be you and target your friends.
whatToDoInstead: Share just the day: "It's my birthday"
Keep full birthdates private on all social media
Use privacy settings to hide birthday information
explanation.quickTip: Celebrate without the date, people don't need to know the exact date.

explanation.title: Class Schedule Paper
explanation.whatFound: School schedule showing daily times and room number
explanation.whyDangerous: Expose your daily routine which makes you predictable and easier to target.
whatToDoInstead: Don't post photos that show your daily routine
Keep papers with personal information out of frame
explanation.quickTip: When showing off your study corner, make sure nothing on the walls reveals your personal information.

caption: Soccer practice Mondays and Wednesdays 4pm at Riverside Field! ⚽ #soccer #practice

explanation.title: Soccer practice schedule in caption
explanation.whatFound: Specific location, days, and times for regular activity
explanation.whyDangerous: Including your regular schedule in description allow creep to approach you when you're focused on practice.
whatToDoInstead: Don't share specific times and locations of regular activities
explanation.quickTip: Share what you do, but not when and where you do it.

explanation.title: License Plate "ABC-1234"
explanation.whatFound: License plate number on family car
explanation.whyDangerous: Someone could follow your car, find out where you live, and learn your family's routine.
whatToDoInstead: Always blur or cover license plates in photos
Check all car photos before posting
explanation.quickTip: Most photo editing apps have a blur tool!

safeExplanation.whatMakesSafe: This photo shows your talent without revealing any personal information about you.
whyOk: No school names or locations
Just shows your creativity and skills
safeExplanation.keepSharing: Art and creative projects are perfect for social media!

safeExplanation.whatMakesSafe: Pet name doesn't expose anything about you.
whyOk: Pet name isn't connected to your identity
Just a cute pet photo
safeExplanation.keepSharing: Pet photos are adorable and safe when backgrounds are generic.

safeExplanation.whatMakesSafe: Food photos are perfect for social media!
whyOk: Just shows the food
Document is fine if it is a recipe
safeExplanation.keepSharing: Food photos, especially close-ups, are safe and fun to post.

safeExplanation.whatMakesSafe: This selfie shows just your face and shoulders.
whyOk: Face only
Blurred or plain background
safeExplanation.keepSharing: Crop close to your face and blur the background.

safeExplanation.title: Sunset/nature
safeExplanation.whatMakesSafe: Pictures like this are safe to share when there are no identifiable objects in the description.
whyOk: No identifiable landmarks
Could be anywhere
safeExplanation.keepSharing: Nature photography is a great way to share your interests!

safeExplanation.whatMakesSafe: Showing your pc setup is just a hobby and interest!
whyOk: Just shows your equipment and setup
No mail or packages with addresses
safeExplanation.keepSharing: Tech and gaming setups are awesome to share!

safeExplanation.whatMakesSafe: This image doesn't have any paper or document that expose personal information.
whyOk: Generic book covers with no readable text
No address or location details in the background
safeExplanation.keepSharing: Reading spaces and cozy corners are perfect for social media.

safeExplanation.whatMakesSafe: This shows you playing basketball without revealing where you practice.
whyOk: Generic outdoor court
No team names or jerseys with school info
safeExplanation.keepSharing: Sports action shots are great for social media but check description before posting.

safeExplanation.whatMakesSafe: This band photo shows your musical interests without revealing personal information.
whyOk: Generic practice space background
Just shows your hobby and friends
safeExplanation.keepSharing: Music, hobbies, and friend group photos are safe when the background and location is generic.

safeExplanation.whatMakesSafe: The image is safe because it was taken from the top and has a closeup view.
whyOk: Just shows your craft supplies and project
No papers with names or addresses
safeExplanation.keepSharing: Craft projects and creative hobbies are great content to share!

safeExplanation.whatMakesSafe: The photo's backgrounds are blurred and no personal information is being revealed.
whyOk: Background is completely blurred
No location identifiers visible
safeExplanation.keepSharing: Friend group photos are safe when you blur the background and are generic.

safeExplanation.whatMakesSafe: This post is completely safe since the trophy has NO school name or personal information.
whyOk: No text revealing which school
No room number or team name
safeExplanation.keepSharing: Celebrating your achievements is a proud thing to share!
